# Shi Zhang (Simon) — Engineer & Designer

> Personal portfolio & blog of Shi Zhang (Simon), a Founding Software Engineer at IDitor Inc building AI-powered social applications. Multidisciplinary background spanning Architecture (B.Arch RPI / MS Design UPenn), Computer Science (MSCS Northeastern), and Data Analytics & Engineering. Site theme: "Design Meets Computer Science."

## Navigation

- [Home](https://shizhang.github.io/): Main portfolio — hero, about, skills, work projects, resume timeline, blog preview, contact section. Dark theme with Bebas Neue + DM Mono typography, cursor effects, hero distortion, and scroll-triggered animations.
- [Blog](https://shizhang.github.io/blog.html): Full essay archive with all blog posts listed chronologically. Reader uses GitHub-hosted markdown files from `_posts/`.
- [Projects](https://shizhang.github.io/projects.html): Filterable project gallery (All / Web / Mobile / Computer Vision / AI/ML).
- [Resume](https://shizhang.github.io/resume.html): Detailed education and professional experience with card-stack layout.
- [Biography](https://shizhang.github.io/biography.html): Full career narrative with Mermaid diagrams showing career transition path.
- [Contact](https://shizhang.github.io/contact.html): Email, LinkedIn, X, GitHub, Behance, Ideogram links.
- [Blog Dashboard](https://shizhang.github.io/blog_dashboard.html): GitHub-integrated post editor for CRUD on markdown posts in `_posts/`.

## About

Shi Zhang is a founding software engineer at IDitor Inc, a San Francisco-based AI social startup. He holds an MSCS from Northeastern University (May 2025) and is pursuing an MS in Data Analytics & Engineering (2025–2026). His career began in architecture — B.Arch from RPI and MS Design from UPenn — before transitioning into software engineering. He believes the best software lives at the intersection of engineering precision and design empathy.

- Email: zhangshi0512@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhangshisimon/
- X: https://x.com/Simonsterrific
- GitHub: https://github.com/zhangshi0512
- Behance: https://www.behance.net/Simonarch
- Ideogram: https://ideogram.ai/@simonsterrific/pinned

## Technical Skills

- **Languages**: TypeScript/JavaScript (95%), Python (90%), SQL (88%), Java/Kotlin (82%), C++ (78%)
- **Frameworks**: React.js/Next.js (96%), Node.js (88%), Flask (80%), Vue.js (75%), Spring Boot (72%)
- **Tools & Data**: PostgreSQL/Supabase (90%), LLM Integration GPT/Claude/Gemini (92%), Vector Search/Embeddings (85%), OpenCV/Computer Vision (84%), Docker/AWS (80%)

## Work Experience

- **Founding Software Engineer** @ IDitor Inc (Nov 2025 – Present, San Francisco, CA): Built multi-platform social ecosystem (Flutter + Next.js). Integrated Gemini, OpenAI & Claude. Engineered vector embeddings + random-walker clustering across 40k+ geospatial memories.
- **Software Engineer** @ IDitor Inc (Sep 2024 – Dec 2024, Hillsborough, CA): User-matching service with cosine similarity & semantic search (+20% accuracy). Chat-simulation API with OpenAI (-30% response time).
- **Software Engineer** @ Graph Academy (May 2024 – Aug 2024, Cupertino, CA): Scaled AI-driven app to handle 35% more concurrent users. Boosted engagement 30% and registrations 50%.
- **Research Assistant** @ Northeastern University (May 2023 – Dec 2023, Seattle, WA): Benchmarked NoSQL/distributed SQL with YCSB+T. NLP resume matching improved recruiter efficiency 25%.
- **Architectural Designer** @ Ballinger (Feb 2020 – Nov 2022, Philadelphia, PA): Managed a 1.6M sq. ft. healthcare project. Automated Excel-Revit with Python scripts.

## Education

- Certificate in Data Analytics & Engineering — Northeastern University (Fall 2025 – Spring 2026)
- MS Computer Science — Northeastern University, Seattle WA (Graduated May 2025)
- MS Design — University of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia PA (Dec 2019)
- Bachelor of Architecture — Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute, Troy NY (May 2018)

## Projects

- [EchoChat](https://www.iditor.com/): Multi-platform AI social ecosystem. Flutter, Next.js, Multi-LLM, 40k+ memories.
- [EchoMemory](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/echomemory/ajpnpcldpacnhpclcfhfgaiiokmcncdg): Chrome extension for capturing browsing context into persistent memory. OpenClaw, Supabase, vector sync.
- [PollenBoard](https://github.com/zhangshi0512/Pollenboard): Web app for creating/sharing AI-generated content. Next.js 15, TypeScript, Pollinations.AI.
- [Real-Time AR System](https://github.com/zhangshi0512/cs5330_project04_calibration-AugmentedReality): C++ + OpenCV camera calibration and 3D projection. Computer vision.
- [FactHub](https://factup.netlify.app/): Full-stack social voting/community app. React, Supabase.
- [StayStocked](https://vimeo.com/822187167): Android grocery inventory app. Kotlin, Kroger API, 140+ users.
- [Real-Time Object Classifier](https://github.com/zhangshi0512/cs5330_project03_realTime2DObjectRecognition): C++ + OpenCV with KNN and Hausdorff distance. Computer vision.
- [Creatorverse](https://creatorverse-theta.vercel.app/): Content creator management platform. React, Supabase, CRUD.
- [AI Chat with Document Context](https://rag-chatbot-lac.vercel.app/): RAG chatbot with local and external AI models. React, Next.js.
